cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about which statement is true about folk medicine. First, I need to read the passage again to make sure I understand the key points. The passage starts by saying that folk medicine keeps the body healthy by using medicines from plants and herbs. It mentions that materials for making medicine are found everywhere, so people can practice folk medicine anywhere in the world. It also talks about how folk medicine dates back to earliest humans and animals using plants. Animals
